title: drymonia longiflora
intro: Drymonia longiflora, also known as the long-flowered drymonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Drymonia longiflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
